message:
feat(html_export): add message grouping template and test fixtures

HTML export enhancements:
- template.rs: Template updates for message grouping rendering
- lib.rs: Module integration updates

Add test fixtures for message grouping:
- tests/fixtures/message_grouping/claude_session.jsonl
- tests/fixtures/message_grouping/codex_session.jsonl
- tests/fixtures/message_grouping/cursor_session.jsonl
- tests/fixtures/message_grouping/opencode_session.jsonl

These fixtures enable testing consolidated message rendering across
different agent session formats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
